steps: The graphed function is $y = f(x)+4$. At $x=0$ the graph shows $y=8$, so the y-intercept of $f(x)+4$ is $8$.
All choices have the form $f(x)=-6^x+c$. At $x=0$: $f(0)=-6^0+c=-1+c$. Setting $-1+c=4$ gives $c=5$, so $f(x)=-6^x+5$.
In Desmos, graph $f(x)+4$ for each choice. Only choice B produces $y=-(6)^x+9$, whose y-intercept is $8$ and matches the displayed graph.
choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — '$f(x)=-6^x+1$': $f(0)=-1+1=0 eq 4$. ✗
  • Choice B — '$f(x)=-6^x+5$': $f(0)=-1+5=4$ ✓. Then $f(x)+4=-6^x+9$, y-intercept $8$ matches graph. ✓
  • Choice C — '$f(x)=-6^x+8$': $f(0)=-1+8=7 eq 4$. ✗
  • Choice D — '$f(x)=-6^x+9$': $f(0)=-1+9=8 eq 4$. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
